recommendations.overview: Eugene, a young nobleman, asks two penniless idlers to impersonate his noble relatives to help him marry Gemma, the daughter of an enriched cook.

recommendations.overview: A youth group is preparing for what will be the summer of their life, including secrets, lies, sex, confusion, evenings and holidays.

recommendations.title: Medusa
recommendations.overview: After being bitten by a lethal snake, a young woman experiences changes in her senses and appearance, as she sheds her old self and slowly turns into a deadly weapon.
